content:
type: SURVEY
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
note: Feature: fix resource leak in shell completion. In shell_completion.py: rewrite _resolve_context() to wrap cli.make_context()/cmd.make_context() calls in 'with' statements (3 call sites: root ctx, non-chained sub_ctx, chained sub_sub_ctx) so Context.__exit__ closes file handles. In core.py: only a docstring tweak on Context.exit() versionchanged note (no behavioral change).

fields.note: Feature: fix resource leak in shell completion. In core.py: only a docstring tweak on Context.exit() versionchanged note (no behavioral change).
